Hello!

I would like to contribute a new ports collection named
`xloadface-1.6.1'(ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
                                     xloadface-ports.1116.tar.gz)
xloadface-1.6.1 is a network load monitor for X11.
Please have a look at it.
